name: Dowel Leg Accent Chair - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Create a cozy spot in your home with this Slipper Chair with Dowel Leg from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This upholstered chair features a padded seat and back in light textured beige for comfortable seating, paired with a light brown frame for a chic contrast. The armless design and dowel legs give it a sleek, streamlined look, while the rubberwood frame lends perfect balance. This slipper chair works well in your living room or reading nook.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

'Overall Width: 28inches
Overall Depth: 31inches
Overall Height: 33.5inches
Seat Width: 26.75inches
Seat Depth: 21inches
Height from seat top to floor: 18.5inches
